In check_celsius_to_fahrenheit, call celsius_to_fahrenheit(c) and compare with abs(result - expected) < 0.01 to handle floating-point noise.
In test_celsius_conversions, loop: `for c, expected in cases: check_celsius_to_fahrenheit(c, expected)`
For test_celsius_to_fahrenheit_invalid: use assert_raises(ValueError, celsius_to_fahrenheit, -300) — the helper is already defined for you.
For test_parse_temp_invalid: use assert_raises(ValueError, parse_temp, 'hot') — same helper.
